<a id="class-inputmap"></a>

# InputMap

**Inherits:** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A singleton that manages all [InputEventAction](class_inputeventaction.md#class-inputeventaction)s.

## Description

Manages all [InputEventAction](class_inputeventaction.md#class-inputeventaction) which can be created/modified from the project settings menu **Project > Project Settings > Input Map** or in code with [add_action()](#class-inputmap-method-add-action) and [action_add_event()](#class-inputmap-method-action-add-event). See [Node._input()](class_node.md#class-node-private-method-input).

## Tutorials

- [Using InputEvent: InputMap](../tutorials/inputs/inputevent.html#inputmap)

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-add-event"></a>

 **action_add_event**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), event: [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-add-event)

Adds an [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) to an action. This [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) will trigger the action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-erase-event"></a>

 **action_erase_event**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), event: [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-erase-event)

Removes an [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) from an action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-erase-events"></a>

 **action_erase_events**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-erase-events)

Removes all events from an action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-get-deadzone"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **action_get_deadzone**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-get-deadzone)

Returns a deadzone value for the action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-get-events"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent)] **action_get_events**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-get-events)

Returns an array of [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent)s associated with a given action.

**Note:** When used in the editor (e.g. a tool script or [EditorPlugin](class_editorplugin.md#class-editorplugin)), this method will return events for the editor action. If you want to access your project's input binds from the editor, read the `input/*` settings from [ProjectSettings](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings).

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-has-event"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **action_has_event**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), event: [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-has-event)

Returns `true` if the action has the given [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) associated with it.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-action-set-deadzone"></a>

 **action_set_deadzone**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), deadzone: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-action-set-deadzone)

Sets a deadzone value for the action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-add-action"></a>

 **add_action**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), deadzone: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0.2) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-add-action)

Adds an empty action to the **InputMap** with a configurable `deadzone`.

An [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) can then be added to this action with [action_add_event()](#class-inputmap-method-action-add-event).

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-erase-action"></a>

 **erase_action**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)) [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-erase-action)

Removes an action from the **InputMap**.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-event-is-action"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **event_is_action**(event: [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent), action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname), exact_match: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false)  [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-event-is-action)

Returns `true` if the given event is part of an existing action. This method ignores keyboard modifiers if the given [InputEvent](class_inputevent.md#class-inputevent) is not pressed (for proper release detection). See [action_has_event()](#class-inputmap-method-action-has-event) if you don't want this behavior.

If `exact_match` is `false`, it ignores additional input modifiers for [InputEventKey](class_inputeventkey.md#class-inputeventkey) and [InputEventMouseButton](class_inputeventmousebutton.md#class-inputeventmousebutton) events, and the direction for [InputEventJoypadMotion](class_inputeventjoypadmotion.md#class-inputeventjoypadmotion) events.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-get-action-description"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_action_description**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname))  [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-get-action-description)

Returns the human-readable description of the given action.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-get-actions"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname)] **get_actions**() [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-get-actions)

Returns an array of all actions in the **InputMap**.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-has-action"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_action**(action: [StringName](class_stringname.md#class-stringname))  [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-has-action)

Returns `true` if the **InputMap** has a registered action with the given name.

---

<a id="class-inputmap-method-load-from-project-settings"></a>

 **load_from_project_settings**() [🔗](#class-inputmap-method-load-from-project-settings)

Clears all [InputEventAction](class_inputeventaction.md#class-inputeventaction) in the **InputMap** and load it anew from [ProjectSettings](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings).
